final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: product-mockup
Asset type: corporate employee ID badge mockup, both front and back sides shown
Primary request: photorealistic design of a ByteDance (字节跳动) employee ID badge, displaying front and back faces side by side
Scene/backdrop: clean light gray studio surface, subtle soft shadow beneath each card
Subject: two ID badge cards laid flat or slightly angled — front face showing company logo "字节跳动 / ByteDance", employee photo placeholder, name, department, employee ID number; back face showing barcode/QR code, company address, card policy text
Style/medium: photorealistic product photography
Composition/framing: top-down or slight 15° overhead angle, both cards arranged side by side with small gap, centered composition
Lighting/mood: soft diffused studio light, clean and corporate, no harsh shadows
Color palette: white card base, ByteDance signature orange-red accent (#FF4500 range), black text, subtle gray secondary text
Materials/textures: glossy PVC card surface with slight specular highlight, printed ink texture, lanyard hole at top
Text (verbatim): "字节跳动" "ByteDance"
Constraints: both front and back must be fully visible; badge proportions must follow standard CR80 card ratio (85.6mm × 54mm); logo placement top-center on front
Avoid: cartoon style, floating elements with no shadow, illegible micro-text rendered as noise
